anti_claim: The capsule demonstrates a public projection DLP gate over rendered files, path names, symlink escapes, and optional gitleaks output. It is not a general security scanner, prompt-injection defense, sandbox, information-flow proof, or release authority.
kind_name: Engine room public projection leak gate
source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)
validation_rules: validate required source refs or target refs remain public-safe
preserve draft/staged status until an active v2 acceptance lane supplies validator and receipt evidence
reject release, provider dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, and whole-system correctness claims
receipt_expectations: record validator command and result when an admitting validator exists
do not place source bodies, private paths, credentials, provider payloads, or operator thread content in receipts

required_reentry: claim the shared mechanism, capsule, registry, and aggregate projection surfaces only under the admitting owner lane
run validator_contract.fixture_command and the focused public pytest for this standard
record receipt_contract evidence with validator result, authority ceiling, anti-claim, and body-in-receipt boundary
refresh aggregate doctrine-lattice projections only after source admission is landed and the aggregate owner claim is clean
non_laundering_rules: fixture pass is not active v2 standard support
legacy Markdown or generated paper-module projection is not subject authority
empty used_by_organs is intentional until an organ or mechanism subject is admitted
receipt_contract.required remains false while receipt_id is null
activation_boundary.claim_ceiling: fixture-backed staged standard pressure only, not active public runtime standard, accepted organ, release approval, or whole-system correctness

author.purpose: create a valid Engine room public projection leak gate instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Engine room public projection leak gate without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_engine_room_public_projection_leak_gate and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

doctrine_kind_envelope.claim_ceiling: inventory and standard-shape visibility only, not active v2 acceptance
